mapper.sql: ( d.last_value IS NOT NULL AND d.last_value > -2000 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, d.last_updated, UTC_TIMESTAMP()) <= 30 )
SELECT d.id_site, IF(,d.last_value, NULL) AS activePower FROM device d WHERE d.id_device_type IN(3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.`status` = 1
SELECT d.id_site, IF(,d.last_value, NULL) AS activePower FROM device d WHERE d.id_device_type = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.`status` = 1

SELECT d.id_site, IF(d.field_value2 > 0, d.field_value2, NULL) AS expected_power_virtual, IF(d.last_value > 0, IF(d.last_value < -2000, 0, d.last_value), NULL) AS activePower FROM device d WHERE d.id_device_type = 12
select count(d.id) from device d where d.status = 1 and d.is_delete = 0 and d.id_device_type = 1

WHEN d.last_updated IS NULL THEN "Never" WHEN dg.table_name IN ('model_power_measurement_ion_7650', 'model_satcon_powergate_225_inverter' 'model_meter_ion_8600', 'model_meter_ion_8600v1','model_campell_scientific_meter1','model_campell_scientific_meter2','model_campell_scientific_meter3' 'model_meter_ion_8600v2', 'model_meter_ion_8600v3','model_campell_scientific_meter4' 'model_meter_ion_8600v4','model_aes_tx_inverter', 'model_advanced_energy_solaron' 'model_sma_inverter_stp62us41', 'model_sma_inverter_stp30000tlus10', 'model_datalogger', 'model_solaredge_inverter', 'model_solaredge_inverter_v1','model_sunny_central_class9775_inverter' ) AND d.field_value_default IN ('kWTot', 'pt33','Meter1_ACPower','Meter2_ACPower','Meter3_ACPower','Meter4_ACPower','POACMP11','AmbientTemp') THEN IF(d.field_value1 = -1 or d.field_value1 IS NULL, "-", CONCAT_WS(" ", ROUND(d.field_value1, 2), "kW" ))
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.devicename, dt.name AS device_type_name, d.serial_number, d.datatablename, tz.value AS timezone, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( d.last_updated, 'UTC', tz.`value` ) , '%m/%d/%Y %h:%i %p') AS last_updated, d.modbusdevicenumber, d.order_id, d.serialnumber, d.rating_ac_power,
FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_group dg ON dg.id = d.id_device_group LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone tz ON tz.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id = #{deviceId} AND dt.is_delete = 0 AND s.is_delete = 0

SELECT ROUND(dt.nvmActiveEnergy - todayEnergy.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) AS yieldToday, ROUND(todayEnergy.nvmActiveEnergy - yesterdayEnergy.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) AS yieldYesterday, ROUND(dt.nvmActiveEnergy - last7DaysEnergy.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) AS yieldLast7Days, ROUND(dt.nvmActiveEnergy - ytdEnergy.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) AS yieldYTD FROM ${dataTable} dt JOIN ( SELECT MIN(IF(sub_dt.time >= CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{timeZone}), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{timeZone}, 'UTC'), sub_dt.time, NULL)) AS todayMinTime, MIN(IF(sub_dt.time >= CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{timeZone}), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{timeZone}, 'UTC'), sub_dt.time, NULL)) AS yesterdayMinTime, MIN(IF(sub_dt.time >= CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{timeZone}), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{timeZone}, 'UTC'), sub_dt.time, NULL)) AS last7DaysMinTime, MIN(sub_dt.time) AS ytdMinTime, MAX(sub_dt.time) AS maxTime FROM ${dataTable} sub_dt WHERE sub_dt.id_device = #{deviceId} AND sub_dt.time >= CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{timeZone}), '%Y-01-01 00:00:00'), #{timeZone}, 'UTC') AND sub_dt.nvmActiveEnergy IS NOT NULL ) timeRange ON timeRange.maxTime = dt.time JOIN ${dataTable} todayEnergy ON todayEnergy.id_device = #{deviceId} AND todayEnergy.time = timeRange.todayMinTime LEFT JOIN ${dataTable} yesterdayEnergy ON yesterdayEnergy.id_device = #{deviceId} AND yesterdayEnergy.time = timeRange.yesterdayMinTime LEFT JOIN ${dataTable} last7DaysEnergy ON last7DaysEnergy.id_device = #{deviceId} AND last7DaysEnergy.time = timeRange.last7DaysMinTime LEFT JOIN ${dataTable} ytdEnergy ON ytdEnergy.id_device = #{deviceId} AND ytdEnergy.time = timeRange.ytdMinTime WHERE dt.id_device = #{deviceId}
